diagnosis.root_cause: The previous fresh update loop folded cold proof DB construction into setup and attempted to mutate the sibling Autoresearch checkout directly. Update-fast now consumes an explicit fresh seed artifact and mutates a disposable staged file workspace under reports/audit/artifacts.
fixes: separated seed artifact copy/open/schema validation from measured update operation
staged the mutation file instead of editing the real Autoresearch checkout
primed staged repo state so the first update does not perform global count fallback
kept result JSON emission independent from benchmark success

spans.name: symbol_interning
notes: Symbol interning is measured through shared dictionary lookup/insert calls.
